name: IRC_CAND_SEC_PROFILE_VALUES
description: This table will store actual values for any candidate search profiles that have been created from the FSM UI.

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_RECRUITING_TYPE_VAL
columns.Comments: Stores a single value for recruitng type for a candidate search security profile configured in FSM

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_PERSON_TYPE_VAL
columns.Comments: Stores a single value for person type for a candidate search security profile configured in FSM

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_CAND_COUNTRY_VAL
columns.Comments: Stores a single value for candidate country for a candidate search security profile configured in FSM

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_GRADE_LEVEL_VAL
columns.Comments: Stores a single value for grade level for a candidate search security profile configured in FSM

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_BUSINESS_UNIT_VAL
columns.Comments: Stores a single value for business unit for a candidate search security profile configured in FSM

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_JOB_FAMILY_VAL
columns.Comments: Stores a single value for job family for a candidate search security profile configured in FSM

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_JOB_FUNC_VAL
columns.Comments: Stores a single value for job function for a candidate search security profile configured in FSM

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_LEGAL_EMPLOYER_VAL
columns.Comments: Stores a single value for legal employer for a candidate search security profile configured in FSM

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
